svg.title: Types of reasoning in AI agents
svg.desc: A diagram showing 7 major reasoning types used by AI agent models, organized by category

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the core reasoning engine of an AI agent?')
sendPrompt('Explain Chain-of-Thought reasoning in AI agents in depth')
sendPrompt('Explain ReAct reasoning in AI agents in depth')
sendPrompt('Explain Tree-of-Thought reasoning in AI agents in depth')
sendPrompt('Explain Reflection and self-critique reasoning in AI agents in depth')
sendPrompt('Explain Plan-and-Execute reasoning in AI agents in depth')
sendPrompt('Explain Analogical reasoning in AI agents in depth')
sendPrompt('Explain Causal reasoning in AI agents in depth')
